title: 4 PACK OF PILLOW PROTECTOR COVERS - MACHINE WASHABLE POLYPROPYLENE FABRIC MATERIAL
features: 4 Pack of Washable Polypropylene Fabric Material Pillow Protectors
Strong, Stain Resistant, Machine Washable and Mildew Proof
description: These pillow protectors are excellent quality and great value. Designed to fit standard pillows (Approx Size: 21" x 27" / 50cm x 70cm) These pillow covers are Strong, Stain Resistant, Machine Washable and Mildew Proof The material is a polypropylene spunbonded non woven fabric (the type of material used as head rest covers on aeroplanes) this makes the fabric breathable, soft, light, chemical resistant, nontoxic and environment friendly. Please note that while these pillow protectors will help to prevent sweat stains etc, they are not waterproof. You will receive 1 pack containing 4 pillow protectors.
